'''zhagubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enarthrodia|enarthrodia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enarthrodia|enarthrodia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhagubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhægibith|zhægibith]] || [[word:zhægibij|zhægibij]] || [[word:zhægibish|zhægibish]] || [[word:zhægibi|zhægibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagugubuth|zhagugubuth]] || [[word:zhagugubuj|zhagugubuj]] || [[word:zhagugubush|zhagugubush]] || [[word:zhagugubu|zhagugubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagubuth|zhagubuth]] || [[word:zhagubuj|zhagubuj]] || [[word:zhagubush|zhagubush]] || [[word:zhagubu|zhagubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagufbuth|zhagufbuth]] || [[word:zhagufbuj|zhagufbuj]] || [[word:zhagufbush|zhagufbush]] || [[word:zhagufbuf|zhagufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhagubuthu|zhagubuthu]] || [[word:zhagubuju|zhagubuju]] || [[word:zhagubushu|zhagubushu]] || [[word:zhagubuku|zhagubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhagubuth|zhagubuth]] || [[word:zhagubuj|zhagubuj]] || [[word:zhagubush|zhagubush]] || [[word:zhagubu|zhagubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhagubuthul|zhagubuthul]] || [[word:zhagubujul|zhagubujul]] || [[word:zhagubushul|zhagubushul]] || [[word:zhagubukul|zhagubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhagubuthuthu|zhagubuthuthu]] || [[word:zhagubujuju|zhagubujuju]] || [[word:zhagubushushu|zhagubushushu]] || [[word:zhagubuku|zhagubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhagubuthun|zhagubuthun]] || [[word:zhagubujun|zhagubujun]] || [[word:zhagubushun|zhagubushun]] || [[word:zhagubukun|zhagubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhagubuthuoro|zhagubuthuoro]] || [[word:zhagubujuoro|zhagubujuoro]] || [[word:zhagubushuoro|zhagubushuoro]] || [[word:zhagubukuoro|zhagubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
